name: popover-demo
visual_summary: The Popover Demo component is a versatile, context-aware tooltip that provides extra information or actions when the user interacts with a trigger element. It's useful for displaying additional details without taking up too much space on the page. A developer might use this component to add a secondary level of interaction to their UI.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics:

Name: popover-demo
Description: The Popover Demo component is a versatile, context-aware tooltip that provides extra information or actions when the user interacts with a trigger element. It's useful for displaying additional details without taking up too much space on the page. A developer might use this component to add a secondary level of interaction to their UI.
Style: material, minimal
Interactions: hover, clickable
Tags: tooltip, hint, info

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
